title: Gnarpy!
body:
**Gnarpy** is an alien that is very nice! but dont attack him! He'll attack you back!
When killed, he drops "Gnarpy Whisker" which can be put in a crafting table for "Gnarpy Fur" and with those 2 items, you can craft a plushie! And that's pretty much all to it!

Inspired by "Gnarpy" from ROBLOX game Regrettevator made by: Axolotl Sun

(I am not sure if Gnarpy spawns naturally and i may need to fix some other things)
